title: ludia glaberrima
intro: Ludia glaberrima is a plant species native to tropical Africa, also known as African boxwood or boxwood. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ludia glaberrima include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Ludia glaberrima is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its bark and leaves are used in herbal medicine preparations.
